calendar.matters:
Petition For Division And Modification Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Hoehler for Craig Swayne.

Mr. Hoehler stated that the three Trustees represented three branches of families, that the reason for the division was that one of the children had passed away and that there was some conflict on how to best manage the trusts and that all three trustees agreed to waive bond. In addition, he stated that they wanted to revise the age by which the minors would receive their shares. The Court stated that division of the trust and appointment without bond was granted. The other issues were taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Lazatin.

Petition For Division And Modification Of Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-14-2008 Continued To Jul-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
